option.slowfallcountdown.calculator_enab: Enable or disable slow falling timing notifications.
option.slowfallcountdown.reset_on_local_: Cancel the active countdown when your local player dies.
Uses the same keybinding as Minecraft Controls. It is unbound by default.
option.slowfallcountdown.calculation_tim: Seconds before the final reslowfall reminder.
Seconds of countdown messages before the final reminder. 0 disables countdown.
option.slowfallcountdown.player_only_tar: When enabled, only player hits start the timer. Disable to allow any living entity.
